---
title: "Hovmoller"
output: html_document
---

# Libraries

```{r}

# Libraries
library(terra)
library(ggplot2)

```

# Senegal

```{r}

# Collect files
ndvi_files <- list.files("Data/Senegal/Vegetation/NDVI", pattern = "\\.08\\.tif$", full.names = TRUE)

# Create an empty list to hold results
hov_data_list <- list()

for (file in ndvi_files) {
  # Extract the year from the filename (e.g., "NDVI.h16.2001.08.tif" -> "2001")
  year <- as.numeric(str_extract(basename(file), "\\d{4}"))
  
  # Load the raster
  r <- rast(file)
  
  # Convert the spatial map into a massive raw dataframe (X, Y, Value)
  df <- as.data.frame(r, xy = TRUE)
  colnames(df)[3] <- "NDVI"
  
  df$Lat_Deg <- df$y / 111319.5
  
  # Round the Y coordinate (Latitude) for clean horizontal "slices"
  # calculate the mean NDVI for every single slice.
  row_means <- df %>%
      mutate(Latitude_Slice = round(Lat_Deg, 1)) %>% 
      group_by(Latitude_Slice) %>%
      summarize(Mean_NDVI = mean(NDVI, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
      mutate(Year = year)
  
  # Save this year's slice data into list
  hov_data_list[[as.character(year)]] <- row_means
  print(paste("Processed Year:", year))
}

# Master dataframe
master_hov_df <- bind_rows(hov_data_list)

```

```{r}

start_year <- min(master_hov_df$Year)
end_year   <- max(master_hov_df$Year)

# Create diagram
p_hov <- ggplot(master_hov_df, aes(x = Year, y = Latitude_Slice)) +
  geom_raster(aes(fill = Mean_NDVI)) + 
  # Sand -> Dry Grass -> Jungle
  scale_fill_gradientn(
    colors = c(
    "#8c510a", # Brown (Desert)
    "#f6e8c3", # Cream (Dry Transition)
    "#78c679", # Light Green (Grassland)
    "#00441b"  # Dark Green (Lush)
  ),
  oob = scales::squish,
  limits = c(0, 0.8), # Locks the scale so colors don't shift
  name = "Mean NDVI"
  ) +
  geom_contour(aes(z = Mean_NDVI), breaks = 0.2, color = "red", linewidth = 1) +
  geom_contour(aes(z = Mean_NDVI), breaks = 0.45, color = "darkblue",linewidth = 0.8) +
  labs(
    title = "Sahara Expansion in Senegal (August 2001-2025)",
    subtitle = "Red Line = Desert Boundary (<0.2) | Blue Dashed = Lush Zone (>0.45)",
    x = "Year",
    y = "Latitude (°N)"
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(
      breaks = seq(start_year, end_year, by = 1),
      labels = seq(start_year, end_year, by = 1), 
      expand = c(0, 0)
      ) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0)) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)
  )

ggsave("Images/Diagrams/Hovmoller_Senegal_NDVI.png", plot = p_hov, width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300)

```

# Chad

```{r}

# Collect files
ndvi_files <- list.files("Data/Chad/Vegetation/NDVI", pattern = "\\.08\\.tif$", full.names = TRUE)

# Create an empty list to hold results
hov_data_list <- list()

for (file in ndvi_files) {
  year <- as.numeric(str_extract(basename(file), "\\d{4}"))
  
  # Load the raster
  r <- rast(file)
  
  # Convert the spatial map into a massive raw dataframe (X, Y, Value)
  df <- as.data.frame(r, xy = TRUE)
  colnames(df)[3] <- "NDVI"
  
  df$Lat_Deg <- df$y / 111319.5
  
  # Round the Y coordinate (Latitude) for clean horizontal "slices"
  # calculate the mean NDVI for every single slice.
  row_means <- df %>%
      mutate(Latitude_Slice = round(Lat_Deg, 1)) %>% 
      group_by(Latitude_Slice) %>%
      summarize(Mean_NDVI = mean(NDVI, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
      mutate(Year = year)
  
  # Save this year's slice data into list
  hov_data_list[[as.character(year)]] <- row_means
  print(paste("Processed Year:", year))
}

# Master dataframe
master_hov_df <- bind_rows(hov_data_list)

```

```{r}

start_year <- min(master_hov_df$Year)
end_year   <- max(master_hov_df$Year)

# Create diagram
p_hov <- ggplot(master_hov_df, aes(x = Year, y = Latitude_Slice)) +
  geom_raster(aes(fill = Mean_NDVI)) + 
  # Sand -> Dry Grass -> Jungle
  scale_fill_gradientn(
    colors = c(
    "#8c510a", # Brown (Desert)
    "#f6e8c3", # Cream (Dry Transition)
    "#78c679", # Light Green (Grassland)
    "#00441b"  # Dark Green (Lush)
  ),
  oob = scales::squish,
  limits = c(0, 0.8), # Locks the scale so colors don't shift
  name = "Mean NDVI"
  ) +
  geom_contour(aes(z = Mean_NDVI), breaks = 0.2, color = "red", linewidth = 1) +
  geom_contour(aes(z = Mean_NDVI), breaks = 0.45, color = "darkblue",linewidth = 0.8) +
  labs(
    title = "Sahara Expansion in Chad (August 2001-2025)",
    subtitle = "Red Line = Desert Boundary (<0.2) | Blue Dashed = Lush Zone (>0.45)",
    x = "Year",
    y = "Latitude (°N)"
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(
      breaks = seq(start_year, end_year, by = 1),
      labels = seq(start_year, end_year, by = 1), 
      expand = c(0, 0)
      ) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0)) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)
  )

ggsave("Images/Diagrams/Hovmoller_Chad_NDVI.png", plot = p_hov, width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300)

```
